allow: Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute gastos-db --local --command "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE name=''group_members''")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute gastos-db --local --command "SELECT id, user_id, display_name FROM group_members")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute gastos-db --local --command "UPDATE group_members SET user_id = NULL WHERE user_id = ''null''")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute gastos-db --local --command "SELECT id, email, display_name FROM users")
Bash(npx wrangler r2 bucket create gastos-receipts)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 migrations apply gastos-db --remote)
Bash(npx wrangler pages project create gastos-web --production-branch main)
Bash(npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name gastos-web)
